news.t: Transamerica Launches Two Actively Managed ETFs, Expanding Access to Established Large Value and Bond Strategies

overview.description: The Transamerica Bond Active ETF (TABD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed bond ETF investing across a broad range of US and global fixed income sectors. The fund seeks total return through a combination of current income and capital appreciation TABD was launched on Dec 15, 2025 and is issued by Transamerica.

data.title: Transamerica Launches Two Actively Managed ETFs, Expanding Access to Established Large Value and Bond Strategies
data.text: BALTIMORE, Dec. 16, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Transamerica today announced the introduction of Transamerica Large Value Active ETF (TALV) and Transamerica Bond Active ETF (TABD) on the New York Stock Excha...
